J8 | 11 | 23 | 19 | 17
J9 | 31 | 9 | 21 | 18

J12 | 8 | 33 | 8 | 21

- J6 and J11 must use different machines.

- J12 may not use Y.
- If J10 uses W, then J2 may not use Y.

- If J3 uses Z, then J7 may not use Z.
- If J11 uses X, then J9 may not use W.
- Exactly one of J12, J2, and J7 must use X.
- Exactly one of J7, J8, and J3 must use Y.
